sentences.target: Tu accélères trop dans ce virage.

translations.fr: Tu accélères trop dans ce virage.
translations.en: You're speeding up too much in this turn.
translations.es: Estás acelerando demasiado en esta curva.
translations.de: Du beschleunigst in dieser Kurve zu stark.
translations.it: Stai accelerando troppo in questa curva.
translations.ko: 이 커브에서 너무 빨리 가속하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在这个弯道上加速太快了。
translations.yue: 你喺呢個彎位加速得太快。
translations.ru: Ты слишком быстро разгоняешься на этом повороте.
translations.pt: Você está acelerando demais nesta curva.
translations.he: אתה מאיץ יותר מדי בפנייה הזאת.
translations.vi: Bạn tăng tốc quá nhanh ở khúc cua này.
translations.ar: أنت تُسرّع كثيرًا في هذا المنعطف.
translations.nl: Je accelereert te veel in deze bocht.
translations.uk: Ти надто швидко розганяєшся на цьому повороті.
translations.hu: Túl gyorsan gyorsítasz ebben a kanyarban.
translations.hi: तुम इस मोड़ पर बहुत तेज़ी से गति बढ़ा रहे हो.
translations.pl: Za bardzo przyspieszasz na tym zakręcie.
translations.el: Επιταχύνεις πάρα πολύ σε αυτή τη στροφή.
translations.nb: Du akselererer for mye i denne svingen.
translations.id: Kamu terlalu cepat menambah kecepatan di tikungan ini.
translations.sv: Du accelererar för mycket i den här kurvan.
translations.ro: Accelerezi prea mult în această curbă.
translations.da: Du accelererer for meget i dette sving.
translations.ja: このカーブで加速しすぎている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; informal 'you'; syntactic subject of the clause.
Main verb: present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'tu'; denotes increasing speed.
Degree adverb modifying the verb, expressing excess.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) specifying the noun.
Common noun (masculine singular), head of the PP governed by 'dans'; here: road bend/curve.

sentences.target: Je préfère ne pas accélérer ici.

translations.fr: Je préfère ne pas accélérer ici.
translations.en: I prefer not to speed up here.
translations.vi: Tôi thà không tăng tốc ở đây.
translations.hi: मैं यहाँ गति नहीं बढ़ाना पसंद करता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil helst ikke akselerere her.
translations.id: Aku lebih suka tidak menambah kecepatan di sini.
translations.da: Jeg vil helst ikke accelerere her.
translations.ja: ここでは加速したくない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'préfère'.
Main verb: present indicative, 1st person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Negation particle (first part of 'ne… pas'); paired with 'pas' to negate the infinitive.
Negation adverb completing 'ne… pas'.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'préfère' within the negated infinitival phrase.
Adverb of place modifying the predicate.

sentences.target: Le bus accélère après le feu vert.
sentences.reading: /lə bys ak.se.lɛʁ a.pʁɛ lə fø vɛʁ/

translations.fr: Le bus accélère après le feu vert.
translations.ipa: /lə bys ak.se.lɛʁ a.pʁɛ lə fø vɛʁ/
translations.en: The bus speeds up after the green light.
translations.es: El autobús acelera después del semáforo en verde.
translations.de: Der Bus beschleunigt, sobald die Ampel grün wird.
translations.it: L'autobus accelera dopo il semaforo verde.
translations.pt: O ônibus acelera após o sinal verde.
translations.vi: Xe buýt tăng tốc sau đèn xanh.
translations.nl: De bus versnelt na het groene licht.
translations.hu: A busz felgyorsít a zöld lámpa után.
translations.hi: बस हरी बत्ती के बाद गति बढ़ाती है.
translations.el: Το λεωφορείο επιταχύνει μετά το πράσινο φανάρι.
translations.ja: バスは青信号の後に加速する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'bus'.
Common noun (masculine), subject of 'accélère'.
Main verb: present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'bus'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'feu'.
Common noun (masculine singular), object of 'après'; here: traffic light.
Adjective (masculine singular) modifying 'feu'; set phrase 'feu vert' = green light.

sentences.target: On accélère un peu pour arriver à l'heure.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ak.se.lɛʁ œ̃ pø puʁ a.ʁi.ve a lœʁ/

translations.fr: On accélère un peu pour arriver à l'heure.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ak.se.lɛʁ œ̃ pø puʁ a.ʁi.ve a lœʁ/
translations.en: Let's speed up a bit to get there on time.
translations.es: Vamos a acelerar un poco para llegar a tiempo.
translations.de: Lass uns ein bisschen beschleunigen, damit wir pünktlich ankommen.
translations.it: Acceleriamo un po' per arrivare in orario.
translations.zh-Hans: 为了准时到达，我们稍微加速一下。
translations.yue: 為咗準時到達，我哋加速少少。
translations.ru: Давай немного ускоримся, чтобы приехать вовремя.
translations.pt: Vamos acelerar um pouco para chegar a tempo.
translations.he: בואו נאיץ קצת כדי להגיע בזמן.
translations.vi: Hãy tăng tốc một chút để đến đúng giờ.
translations.ar: لنسرع قليلًا لنصل في الوقت المناسب.
translations.nl: Laten we een beetje versnellen om op tijd te komen.
translations.uk: Давай трохи прискоримося, щоб прибути вчасно.
translations.hu: Gyorsítsunk egy kicsit, hogy időben odaérjünk.
translations.hi: समय पर पहुँचने के लिए थोड़ा तेज़ चलें.
translations.pl: Przyspieszmy trochę, żeby dotrzeć na czas.
translations.el: Ας επιταχύνουμε λίγο για να φτάσουμε στην ώρα μας.
translations.nb: La oss akselerere litt for å komme i tide.
translations.id: Mari kita menambah kecepatan sedikit agar sampai tepat waktu.
translations.sv: Låt oss accelerera lite för att komma i tid.
translations.ro: Hai să accelerăm puțin ca să ajungem la timp.
translations.cs: Pojďme trochu zrychlit, abychom dorazili včas.
translations.da: Lad os accelerere lidt for at komme til tiden.
translations.ja: 時間どおりに着くために少しスピードを上げよう。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun meaning 'we/one'; takes 3rd person singular verb; subject of 'accélère'.
Main verb: present indicative, 3rd person singular (with 'on'); denotes increasing speed.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) determining 'peu'.
Common noun ('a small amount'), head of the NP 'un peu', used adverbially to indicate degree ('a little').
Subordinating marker introducing a purpose infinitival clause.
Infinitive verb, head of the purpose clause governed by 'pour'.
Preposition introducing the fixed expression 'à l'heure'.
Elided definite article (le/la) before vowel; determiner of 'heure'.
Common noun (feminine singular), object of 'à' in the idiom 'à l'heure' ('on time').
